title: Report oversized CoAP responses instead of returning truncated OK payloads
description: Trigger: a blockwise CoAP response exceeds LICHEN_COAP_MAX_PAYLOAD. lichen/subsys/lichen/coap/coap_client.c truncates blocks around line 172, logs a warning, and still delivers LICHEN_COAP_OK at line 198 with the partial response buffer. Impact: callers cannot distinguish a valid payload from corrupted/truncated data and may act on incomplete application state. Track truncation and return an error status, or reject the response as soon as it exceeds the configured maximum.
close_reason: Implemented fixes in assigned subagents and ran available focused checks; full Zephyr builds remain blocked by existing workspace/module setup issues.
